Keep teams productive from desk to meeting to field. Tablet-to-laptop flexibility delivers exceptional performance wherever work happens.

Fast, secure, and flexible by design, Surface Pro for Business devices are engineered with Microsoft innovation to power productive work anywhere.

Thin and adaptable to any work style

Designed for versatile, intuitive work across changing environments and demands.

Slide %{start} of %{total}. %{slideTitle}
Skip A sneak peek carousel showing five elements of a new era of work

Power that keeps teams moving

Choose an Intel® or Snapdragon® processor with a built-in NPU for AI-powered performance, efficient workdays, and all-day battery life. 1

Bright, immersive display

12-inch 2 or 13-inch 3 anti-reflective 4 touchscreen sizes, with optional OLED 5 on select 13-inch models, or LCD PixelSense™ Flow displays.

Built with sustainability in mind

86% of the enclosure on select devices is made with recycled content. 6 Modular components, 7 including removable SSDs, 8 allow for easy repair and help extend device use.

Sharp camera capabilities

Scan documents with the rear camera or join calls with an ultrawide front camera enhanced by Windows Studio Effects. 9

Flexible and accessible experience

Lightweight and durable with a detachable keyboard and accessible pen, 10 touch, and keyset input.

End of A sneak peek carousel showing five elements of a new era of work section

Security built in from chip to cloud

Safeguard your people and data with the most advanced Windows security stack across hardware, software, firmware, and cloud.

Learn more

  • Reduce exposure with Zero Trust principles that verify access and enforce least privilege.

  • Block advanced attacks by default with Secured-core PCs built on Windows 11 Pro and Microsoft Pluton.

  • Remotely configure Surface UEFI settings via Microsoft Intune using DFCI. 23

  • Protect credentials and streamline recovery with Pluton, BitLocker, Windows Hello, and secure authentication options.

Move work forward faster with AI

Built-in NPUs and powerful AI tools help employees stay productive from first task to last.

Learn more

Recall in an instant

Quickly find past activity with Recall, 11 Copilot Chat, and improved Windows Search. 12

Access Copilot as work happens

Effortlessly interact with Copilot via keyboard, touch, or voice 13 to keep workflows uninterrupted.

Get more done in Microsoft 365

Improve productivity and get real-time assistance with Copilot in the Microsoft 365 suite. 14

Customize AI for your business

Create custom agents and workflows with Windows AI Foundry, Copilot Studio, and Copilot Agents. 15

Recall in an instant

Access Copilot as work happens

Get more done in Microsoft 365

Customize AI for your business

Organizations maximizing impact with Surface

Hear how leading businesses are improving security, productivity, and employee experiences with Surface Pro.

“We selected the Microsoft Surface for its combination of mobility, computing power, and scalable features, which we can effectively utilize, along with its premium design.”

Fady Emad
Group VP of Technology, MAGRABi Retail Group

Read customer story

“Surface is a very secure platform for us. The Windows Hello facial recognition feature, now improved with the infrared camera, has further strengthened our security posture.”

Shahana Nasmin
Senior Information Technology Manager, Insight

Read customer story

Simplified, modern management

From deployment to diagnostics, Surface can help IT professionals reduce overhead, streamline support, and keep devices productive at scale.

Zero-touch lifecycle provisioning

Configure devices in minutes with Windows Autopilot, while remote management with Microsoft Intune 16 streamlines deployment and updates.

Learn more

Extended device protection

Protect your investment, extend device use, and avoid surprise costs with Microsoft Protection Plans.

Learn more

Proactive fleet insights

Improve planning and support with proactive fleet insights from Surface Management Portal, 17 along with hands‑on remediation through Surface IT Toolkit.

Learn more

Our newest, fastest Pro

The Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel is a sleek, versatile 2-in-1 shaped for clarity, comfort, and seamless multitasking as a tablet, laptop, or canvas.

Watch the video Compare

   

Power through AI workflows

The latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) features a built-in 50 TOPS NPU for ultra-fast and responsive on-device AI, supported by up to 64GB LPDDR5x memory.

Reliable, on-the-go connectivity

Optional 5G connectivity 18 and all-day battery life 1 help employees stay productive and in sync wherever work takes them.

Sharp and vivid visuals

Experience enhanced contrast and color accuracy with the optional OLED 5 PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen display.

Type, touch, write, or draw with ease

The detachable keyboard and precise pen input 10 deliver fast, flexible interaction.

Flexible performance across the entire lineup

Choose the Surface Pro for Business with the power and adaptability your organization needs.

New

Powerful performance with built-in AI and optional 5G 18

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

Starting at $1,949.49

  • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
  • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
  • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
  • Optional 5G connectivity

Compare

AI-ready tools in a slim, quiet tablet PC

Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

Starting at $1,199.99

  • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
  • Exceptional battery life
  • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen

 

Compare

AI-powered with reliable enterprise compatibility

Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

Starting at $1,699.99

  • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
  • AI-enhanced communication
  • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
  • Long battery life

Compare

A 5G-optional device 18 with built-in AI for flexible work

Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

Starting at $1,449.99

  • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
  • Exceptional battery life
  • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
  • Optional 5G connectivity

Essential workday accessories

Precision tools crafted for tablet, laptop, and detached work modes, each sold separately.

Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard

Work comfortably whether you’re docked or on the move. The Copilot key 19 delivers fast AI access, while built-in pen storage keeps everything charged and ready.

Learn more

Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard

A compact, comfortable keyboard designed for everyday productivity. Featuring a large glass touchpad and Copilot key 19 for quick access to AI experiences.

Learn more

Surface Slim Pen

Write, sketch, and annotate with natural, pen-on-paper precision. Magnetic attachment makes it easy to store, charge, and keep within reach.

Learn more

Interested in Surface Laptop for Business?

Premium performance and AI power in a thin, durable design.

Explore Laptops

Frequently asked questions

|

  • Surface Pro 2-in-1 PCs combine laptop-level performance with tablet flexibility. They’re built with next-generation processors for organizations that need power, portability, and versatility—with advanced security and manageability for IT.

  • Copilot can help employees find information faster, create content more efficiently, and automate routine tasks. Built-in AI hardware accelerates workloads, while tools like Copilot Studio let IT teams build custom AI agents 15 for organization-specific workflows.

  • Surface Pro for Business devices deliver fast performance with expanded RAM and storage options, 20 long battery life, 1 Wi-Fi 7 21 and Bluetooth® 5.4 support, optional 5G connectivity on select models, 18 and the ability to dock up to three 4K displays for a full workstation setup. 22

  • Yes. All 2-in-1s are Secured-core PCs running Windows 11 Pro. Microsoft Pluton secures identities and encryption keys in hardware, while Windows Hello and BitLocker help safeguard data. IT can manage firmware settings through Microsoft Intune and DFCI for added control. 23

  • Absolutely. All Pro 2-in-1s support zero-touch deployment and remote management with Microsoft Intune. 16 Devices may include removable SSDs 8 and replaceable components 7 to simplify repairs and maximize the use of your fleet.

  • Surface Pro for Business devices are available in two sizes: 12-inch 2 and 13-inch. 3 Select models are engineered with premium durable materials, like 100% recycled aluminum alloy in the enclosure and 100% rare earth metals in the magnets. 6

  • The latest Surface Pro for Business device is the 13-inch, featuring a 13-inch screen 3 and a next-generation Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3). It offers peak performance, built-in AI features, and all-day battery life 1 for maximum workday efficiency.

  • Surface Pro for Business models feature a unique 2-in-1 design that combines the portability of a tablet with the functionality of a laptop.

  • No, Surface Pro for Business devices do not come with a keyboard. Keyboards are sold separately.

  • You can purchase Surface Pro for Business devices from one of our approved partners. Learn more.

  • Copilot+ PC 2-in-1s are Surface Pro devices with built-in 40+ TOPS NPUs that power advanced AI experiences. 24 These processors handle AI workloads locally for enhanced performance and privacy.

  • Surface Pro is a versatile 2-in-1 device that combines the power of a laptop with the flexibility of a tablet. It’s designed for teams that need performance and portability, all in one device.

  • Surface Pro for Business models come in 12-inch and 13-inch screen sizes with various display options, including PixelSense™ Flow or OLED.

  • Surface Pro works as both a tablet and a laptop. With a touchscreen, built-in kickstand, and the option to add a detachable keyboard, it’s great for mobile use and full desktop productivity.

  • Select 13-inch Surface Pro models offer up to 600 nits of brightness, making them easy to view in bright environments like offices, field sites, or outdoor settings.

  • Surface 2-in-1s are designed for teams that need flexibility without compromise—whether that’s hybrid workers, mobile professionals, frontline staff, or creatives who move between desk, meeting, and field.

  • Yes. Every Surface 2-in-1 model meets Microsoft’s Secured-core PC standards, with built-in protections that help safeguard identity, data, and access from chip to cloud.

  • Yes. Surface Pro 2-in-1s support a range of inclusive tools and accessories, including the Surface Adaptive Kit and compatibility with assistive technologies.

  • Most modern Windows apps run smoothly on Surface Pro. For legacy tools, Microsoft offers compatibility support through App Assure. 25

  • Select Surface 2-in-1s offer OLED displays for deeper contrast, richer color, and better visibility in varied lighting—ideal for teams working in design, media, or visual storytelling.

  • Surface Pro for Business devices are designed for organizations that need scalable device management and centralized IT control. These commercial devices run Windows 11 Pro and support enterprise management and security tools to protect endpoint fleets. Consumer Surface Pro devices run Windows 11 Home and are designed for individual use.

  • Surface Pro 9 is a legacy 2-in-1 device. While its flexible 2-in-1 design is similar to newer Surface Pro for Business devices, newer models offer updated hardware, AI-integrated features like Copilot, and next-generation processors like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™ to support modern workflows.

  • Surface Pro 7 is a legacy device that offers the same 2-in-1 flexibility as newer Surface Pro models. Newer Surface Pro devices run Windows 11 Pro, include AI-integrated features like Copilot, and feature next-generation processors like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™ to support evolving workflows.

  • Surface Go 4 for Business was Microsoft’s smallest 2-in-1 device with a compact 10.5-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen display that made it easy to take wherever you go. Surface Pro for Business Copilot+ PCs offer larger 12-inch or 13-inch PixelSense™ screens, include AI-integrated features, and have next-generation processors like Snapdragon® and Intel® Core™.
  • Where to buy
  • Surface blog
  • Power cord recall
  • [1] Battery life varies significantly by configuration and with settings, usage, and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance.
  • [2] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 12-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [3] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [4] The Surface Pro for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [5] OLED screen option available on the Intel® Core™ Ultra X7 processor 368H (Series 3) configuration. 13-inch model only.
  • [6] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024.
  • [7] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [8] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [9] Copilot+ PCs feature; available effects vary by device.
  • [10] Pen and keyboards sold separately.
  • [11] Recall requires Windows Hello Enhanced Sign-in Security. Optimized for select languages [English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish]. Content-based and storage limitations apply.
  • [12] Improved Windows search works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages [English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish].
  • [13] Microsoft 365 Copilot license required. Supports multiple languages; some features only available in English. See what’s new in Voice Access.
  • [14] Requires eligible Microsoft 365 license. File upload and image generation limits apply.
  • [15] Requires Microsoft 365 along with tenant and per user licensing.
  • [16] Microsoft Intune and Azure Active Directory required: sold separately.
  • [17] Surface Management Portal is available to customers who use Microsoft Intune Admin Center and enroll at least one Surface device through Microsoft Intune.
  • [18] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on configuration, carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing. Optional 5G available on Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel and Surface Pro, 13-inch Snapdragon® configurations.
  • [19] Use Copilot key with supported Windows 11 devices; feature availability varies by device and market, see Key Support.
  • [20] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. Surface.com/Storage more details.
  • [21] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [22] External monitor support requires compatible displays, cables, and accessories. See Surface tested peripherals page for compatibility information.
  • [23] Requires Microsoft Intune and Windows Autopilot; available on eligible Autopilot-deployed Surface devices. Supported DFCI settings vary by device.
  • [24] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and market and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies.
  • [25] App Assure is available for eligible Microsoft 365 and Windows customers. Device-based licensing for Microsoft 365 Apps is available via Enterprise Agreement. Learn more at aka.ms/appassure and Microsoft Learn.
